label: micro perf • cancel mid-decode: prompt termination, no zombie, clean recovery
query: List the numbers from one to five hundred as digits separated by spaces. Output only the digits.
notes: The mid-generation Stop-button row: the model is warmed first, a long decode is dispatched, and the cancel fires 500 ms after the FIRST streamed delta — squarely mid-decode. Pass requires the stream to terminate within the cancel-latency ceiling AND a full recovery generation to succeed afterwards. A cancel that wedges (stream keeps decoding past the ceiling) or poisons the next request fails the row; footprint before/after-cancel/after-recovery is recorded for leak triage. Off-CI (needs a local model).
